name: ar_tms_computed_cascade
drl:
rule "S1"
when
    A($k : k)
then
    insertLogical(new U($k + 1));
end
rule "S2"
when
    U($v : v)
then
    insertLogical(new V($v + 1));
end
rule "WGone"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not U()
    not V()
then
end
rule "WAlive"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    V($w : w)
then
end
